---
title: "\'Told at a Village Inn to a Naturalists\' Field Club on a Wet Day (Founded on a Fact)\'"
---

## \'Told at a Village Inn to a Naturalists\' Field Club on a Wet Day (Founded on a Fact)\'

**Author:** The Rt. Rev. William Walsham How
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (February 1885), 101-9.

### Notes

Signed \'William Walsham Bedford\', and by the Rt. Rev. William Walsham How, suffragan Bishop of Bedford.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
